summary: Tested PDF generation feature for Travo DMC B2B Travel Platform - ALL TESTS PASS. Backend PDF endpoint (GET /api/proposals/{id}/pdf) returns valid PDF with proper TRAVO DMC branding. Frontend Download PDF button visible and clickable on ProposalView page. Day-wise itinerary cards, expand/collapse functionality, and Travel Insurance section all working correctly.

issues: React hydration warning about <tr>/<span> inside <tbody> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

pdf_endpoint_200.details: GET /api/proposals/{id}/pdf returns HTTP 200 for existing proposals

pdf_valid_file.details: PDF starts with %PDF header - valid PDF file (~10KB size)

pdf_public_access.details: PDF endpoint accessible without authentication (public endpoint for sharing)

download_pdf_button.details: Download PDF button visible on ProposalView page header with data-testid='download-pdf-btn'

left_sidebar_trip_overview.details: Left sidebar shows 'TRIP OVERVIEW' with Flights, 1 Nights Dubai, Arrival, Departure, Travel Insurance entries

travel_insurance_sidebar.details: 'Travel Insurance' entry present in left sidebar navigation

day_wise_itinerary_cards.details: 2 day cards found with data-testid='day-card-1' and 'day-card-2'

expand_all_days_button.details: Button toggles between '+ EXPAND ALL DAYS' and '- COLLAPSE ALL DAYS' correctly

colored_day_circles.details: 3 colored day circles found (orange for arrival, teal for middle, pink for departure)

tab_navigation.details: 5 tab buttons found with data-testid (Itinerary, Inclusions, Terms and Policies, Messages, Request Changes)

critical_code_review_comments: PDF generation endpoint (lines 586-1046 in server.py) uses fpdf2 library and generates comprehensive PDF with TRAVO DMC branding
PDF contains all required sections: header, proposal title, trip summary, flights (outbound/return), hotels, day-wise itinerary, inclusions, terms & policies, pricing breakdown
Frontend Download PDF button correctly calls api.get(/proposals/{id}/pdf, {responseType: 'blob'}) and triggers file download (lines 669-684 in ProposalView.jsx)
Day cards use proper conditional styling for circles: bg-orange-100 for arrival, bg-pink-100 for departure, bg-teal-100 for middle days
seed_data_creation: Used existing proposals from previous iterations
context_for_next_testing_agent: PDF generation feature fully implemented and tested. Backend endpoint GET /api/proposals/{proposal_id}/pdf generates comprehensive PDF using fpdf2 library with TRAVO DMC branding. Frontend Download PDF button (data-testid='download-pdf-btn') on ProposalView page triggers download. All day-wise itinerary features working: collapsible cards, expand/collapse all, color-coded circles, Travel Insurance section. Test flow: Login -> My Leads -> My Proposals -> View Proposal -> ProposalView page with Download PDF button in header.
